chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No. 176 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ For Orders as to non-prosecution of Reference. 03.09.2024. None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Matter is pending for compliance of office objections since 19.03.2020 and on perusal of the same it reflects that besides various other objections, one of the objection is to the effect that Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Khan, Advocate, whose name is appearing on the file cover has not signed the Vakalatnama nor the Memo of Reference Application. Such conduct on the part of the Applicant cannot be appreciated; whereas, office shall also explain its position as to how the name of Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Khan, Advocate is appearing in the cause list and file cover when he has not signed the Vakalatnama as well as Memo of Reference Application. The Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution; whereas, Response by the concerned official shall be placed for perusal in Chambers. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
